body_txt: noreallife  Female serving staff wearing sexy outfits. These workers will usually be waitresses at a restaurant, but can also be barmaids or other attendants. The alluring attire can be anything from a French Maid costume to Cosplay to a simple short skirt and low-cut top. Sub-Trope of Sex Sells , as serving customers does not require titillating apparel, but it sure is a quick way to get attention and entice the curious. If the waitresses are wearing hot pants and a tight T-shirt/tank top, this outfit is probably a parody of Hooter's, a common target of parody and imitation (if the fact that "breastaurant" is a word is anything to go by). Such places are sometimes presented as family-friendly restaurants, even contrasted as The Moral Substitute to the Red-Light District , but critics counter that bringing one's family there (and implicitly teaching kids to ogle servers) is not particularly wholesome. Compare Kitschy Themed Restaurant or Bad Taste Call-Out when such places are derided for poor taste. Less commonly, the server may be male , and dressed to flatter or expose his physique to the Female Gaze . He may be shirtless , perhaps with a Chippendales Dancers bowtie, a Naked Apron , or some other Rule of Sexy . This is the prominent feature of a Cosplay Café . For a culture-specific variant of the shapely barmaid, see stereotypical depictions of Oktoberfest , where a beer-serving frau may wear a traditional dirndl over mountains that rival the Alps themselves. For a hottie even higher than the mountain peaks, see Sexy Stewardess . Whether a character enjoys a job like this depends on whether she is a Shameless or Reluctant Fanservice Girl . If servers are merely Hired for Their Looks , it can be insulting to those who take the job seriously. And while sexy outfits are not necessarily immoral, a boss demanding they sexualize themselves can easily be demeaning to employees. Compare Go-Go Enslavement and Bad Job, Worse Uniform . Even without an explicit policy, there may be a monetary incentive for a server to dress sexy: if tipping is customary, she may believe she can earn more by turning on the charm (and turning on the customers). Compare Bubbly Waitress , who has an attractive personality and may enjoy dressing to match it. If (after catching their attention) a server becomes another character's Love Interest , see A Side Order of Romance . This item is available in the Trope Co. catalog.
